allow: PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\razva\\Documents\\GitHub\\SPICE-but-its-crazier-and-closed-source-cuz-yes-\\apps\\flutter_client\\windows\\flutter\\ephemeral\\.plugin_symlinks\\media_kit_libs_windows_audio"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $i = Get-Item $p; Write-Output "Name: $\($i.Name\)"; Write-Output "LinkType: $\($i.LinkType\)"; Write-Output "Target: $\($i.Target\)"; Write-Output "Attrs: $\($i.Attributes\)" } else { Write-Output "MISSING" })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList @\("-NoProfile", "-Command", "Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\FileSystem' -Name 'LongPathsEnabled' -Type DWord -Value 1; Write-Host 'LongPathsEnabled set to 1. Reboot recommended.'"\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Triggered UAC prompt \(check your screen\).")
